name: Artichokes with Garlic, Basil, & Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
You will need a large pot with lid to cook the artichokes. Prepare the artichokes by pulling off any tough outer leaves, cutting the stem flat at the bottom, and trimming the tips of all the leaves with kitchen shears. Place the artichokes upright in a pan and cover them with cold water. Add lemon quarters.
Bring the water to boil, then continue boiling the artichokes covered for about 45 minutes, or until done (check by pulling off an outer leaf; if it comes off easily, they're ready). Turn off burner. Remove the artichokes from the pan with tongs and discard the water. Return the artichokes upright to the pan and replace lid. Let them dry out, drain, and stay warm.
While cooking artichokes, heat oil in a saucepan over medium-low heat. Add garlic and zest and cook for 2 minutes. Stir in capers, half cup of caper juice, lemon juice, and crushed pepper flakes. Simmer for 2-3 minutes to develop flavors. Remove from heat and stir in basil and parsley.
